examples.en: Earth is the third planet from the sun.
examples.zh: 地球是離太陽第三近的行星。

examples.en: Scientists found a new planet outside our solar system.
examples.zh: 科學家在太陽系外發現一顆新行星。

img: blue planet orbiting bright sun in space

examples.en: The Milky Way is the galaxy we live in.
examples.zh: 銀河系是我們居住的星系。

examples.en: There are billions of stars in one galaxy.
examples.zh: 一個星系裡有數十億顆恆星。

img: spiral galaxy with glowing stars in deep space

examples.en: The sun is the closest star to Earth.
examples.zh: 太陽是離地球最近的恆星。

examples.en: We watched the stars from the mountain top.
examples.zh: 我們從山頂上觀看星星。

img: bright glowing star in night sky

examples.en: The moon shines brightly tonight.
examples.zh: 今晚月亮閃耀明亮。

examples.en: Jupiter has many moons around it.
examples.zh: 木星周圍有許多衛星。

img: full moon glowing over dark night sky

examples.en: The sun gives us light and heat.
examples.zh: 太陽給我們光和熱。

examples.en: Never look straight at the sun.
examples.zh: 絕對不要直視太陽。

img: bright yellow sun with glowing rays

examples.en: A comet has a long, bright tail.
examples.zh: 彗星有一條明亮的長尾巴。

examples.en: The comet will not return for many years.
examples.zh: 這顆彗星要很多年後才會再出現。

img: comet with glowing tail streaking across space

examples.en: A huge asteroid passed near Earth.
examples.zh: 一顆巨大的小行星從地球附近經過。

examples.en: Most asteroids move between Mars and Jupiter.
examples.zh: 大多數小行星在火星和木星之間運行。

img: rocky asteroid floating in dark space

examples.en: We saw a bright meteor cross the sky.
examples.zh: 我們看見一顆明亮的流星劃過天空。

examples.en: A meteor burns up in the atmosphere.
examples.zh: 流星在大氣層中燃燒殆盡。

img: bright meteor streaking across starry night sky

examples.en: The moon travels in an orbit around Earth.
examples.zh: 月球沿著軌道繞地球運行。

examples.en: Satellites orbit our planet every day.
examples.zh: 衛星每天繞著我們的星球運行。

img: planet orbit path around a glowing sun

examples.en: Gravity pulls objects toward the ground.
examples.zh: 重力把物體拉向地面。

examples.en: There is less gravity on the moon.
examples.zh: 月球上的重力比較小。

img: apple falling to ground showing gravity

examples.en: The universe is bigger than we can imagine.
examples.zh: 宇宙比我們能想像的還要大。

examples.en: Everything in space is part of the universe.
examples.zh: 太空中的一切都是宇宙的一部分。

img: vast universe full of stars and galaxies

examples.en: The spaceship flew toward the red planet.
examples.zh: 太空船朝紅色星球飛去。

examples.en: Astronauts live inside the spaceship for months.
examples.zh: 太空人在太空船裡生活好幾個月。

img: silver spaceship flying through outer space

examples.en: The rocket launched into the sky with fire.
examples.zh: 火箭噴著火焰射向天空。

examples.en: A powerful rocket carries the crew to space.
examples.zh: 強力的火箭把機組人員送上太空。

img: rocket launching with fire and smoke

examples.en: The astronaut floated inside the space station.
examples.zh: 太空人在太空站裡漂浮。

examples.en: Every astronaut trains for many years.
examples.zh: 每位太空人都要訓練很多年。

img: astronaut in white spacesuit floating in space

examples.en: A satellite sends TV signals to our homes.
examples.zh: 衛星把電視訊號傳送到我們家中。

examples.en: The satellite circles the Earth in space.
examples.zh: 這顆衛星在太空中繞地球運行。

img: satellite with solar panels orbiting Earth

examples.en: We looked at Saturn through a telescope.
examples.zh: 我們用望遠鏡看土星。

examples.en: A telescope helps us see distant stars.
examples.zh: 望遠鏡幫助我們看見遙遠的恆星。

img: large telescope pointed at starry sky

examples.en: Our solar system has eight planets.
examples.zh: 我們的太陽系有八顆行星。

examples.en: The sun sits at the center of the solar system.
examples.zh: 太陽位於太陽系的中心。

img: solar system with sun and eight planets

examples.en: Earth is the only planet with life.
examples.zh: 地球是唯一有生命的行星。

examples.en: From space, Earth looks blue and green.
examples.zh: 從太空看,地球呈現藍色和綠色。

img: blue and green Earth seen from space

examples.en: Mars is often called the red planet.
examples.zh: 火星常被稱為紅色星球。

examples.en: Robots explore the surface of Mars.
examples.zh: 機器人在火星表面進行探索。

img: red dusty surface of planet Mars

examples.en: Jupiter is the largest planet in our system.
examples.zh: 木星是我們太陽系中最大的行星。

examples.en: Jupiter has a huge storm called the Great Red Spot.
examples.zh: 木星有個叫大紅斑的巨大風暴。

img: giant gas planet Jupiter with red spot

examples.en: Saturn is famous for its beautiful rings.
examples.zh: 土星以美麗的環而聞名。

examples.en: The rings of Saturn are made of ice and rock.
examples.zh: 土星環由冰和岩石組成。

img: planet Saturn with bright ice rings

examples.en: The spacesuit protects the astronaut from cold.
examples.zh: 太空衣保護太空人免受寒冷。

examples.en: A spacesuit gives the astronaut air to breathe.
examples.zh: 太空衣提供太空人呼吸的空氣。

img: white astronaut spacesuit with helmet

examples.en: Astronauts work on the space station in orbit.
examples.zh: 太空人在軌道上的太空站工作。

examples.en: The space station circles Earth every ninety minutes.
examples.zh: 太空站每九十分鐘繞地球一圈。

img: international space station floating above Earth

examples.en: They will launch the rocket at dawn.
examples.zh: 他們將在黎明時發射火箭。

examples.en: The launch of the spaceship was a success.
examples.zh: 太空船的發射非常成功。

img: rocket launch with flames and smoke cloud

examples.en: Humans want to explore other planets.
examples.zh: 人類想探索其他行星。

examples.en: Robots explore places that are too dangerous for people.
examples.zh: 機器人探索對人類太危險的地方。

img: astronaut exploring rocky alien planet surface

examples.en: Astronauts float because there is no gravity.
examples.zh: 太空人因為沒有重力而漂浮。

examples.en: The tools float around inside the spaceship.
examples.zh: 工具在太空船裡到處漂浮。

img: astronaut floating weightless inside spaceship

examples.en: The Earth spins once every day.
examples.zh: 地球每天自轉一次。

examples.en: Planets spin as they move around the sun.
examples.zh: 行星一邊繞太陽運行一邊旋轉。

img: planet spinning on its axis in space

examples.en: The stars shine brightly at night.
examples.zh: 星星在夜裡明亮地閃耀。

examples.en: The moon shines with light from the sun.
examples.zh: 月亮靠太陽的光而發亮。

img: bright shining stars in dark sky

examples.en: The distant stars are hard to see clearly.
examples.zh: 遙遠的星星很難看清楚。

examples.en: We dream of visiting distant worlds.
examples.zh: 我們夢想造訪遙遠的世界。

img: distant faint stars in deep space

examples.en: Venus is a bright light in the evening sky.
examples.zh: 金星是傍晚天空中明亮的光點。

examples.en: The full moon is very bright tonight.
examples.zh: 今晚的滿月非常明亮。

img: bright glowing planet in evening sky

examples.en: Space is cold and dark.
examples.zh: 太空又冷又暗。

examples.en: We can see more stars in a dark sky.
examples.zh: 在黑暗的天空中我們能看見更多星星。

img: dark empty space with scattered stars

examples.en: A black hole pulls in everything nearby.
examples.zh: 黑洞會吸入附近的一切東西。

examples.en: Not even light can escape a black hole.
examples.zh: 連光都無法逃出黑洞。

img: black hole bending light in deep space

examples.en: Orion is an easy constellation to find.
examples.zh: 獵戶座是容易找到的星座。

examples.en: Ancient people named each constellation.
examples.zh: 古人為每個星座命名。

img: star constellation lines in night sky

examples.en: Earth's atmosphere keeps us safe and warm.
examples.zh: 地球的大氣層讓我們安全又溫暖。

examples.en: Mars has a very thin atmosphere.
examples.zh: 火星有非常稀薄的大氣層。

img: blue atmosphere layer around planet Earth

examples.en: The surface of the moon is full of craters.
examples.zh: 月球表面布滿了坑洞。

examples.en: Robots take photos of the planet's surface.
examples.zh: 機器人拍攝行星表面的照片。

img: rocky moon surface covered with craters

examples.en: A meteor made a huge crater on the moon.
examples.zh: 流星在月球上撞出一個巨大的隕石坑。

examples.en: The crater is deep and round.
examples.zh: 這個隕石坑又深又圓。

img: deep round crater on grey moon surface

examples.en: The moon blocks the sun during an eclipse.
examples.zh: 日食時月亮遮住了太陽。

examples.en: Many people watched the solar eclipse.
examples.zh: 許多人觀看了日食。

img: solar eclipse with dark sun and glowing ring

examples.en: The astronaut did a spacewalk to fix the station.
examples.zh: 太空人進行太空漫步來修理太空站。

examples.en: A spacewalk can last several hours.
examples.zh: 一次太空漫步可能持續好幾個小時。

img: astronaut on spacewalk tethered outside station

examples.en: The mission to the moon took several days.
examples.zh: 登月任務花了好幾天。

examples.en: Their mission is to study a distant planet.
examples.zh: 他們的任務是研究一顆遙遠的行星。

img: space mission control room with screens

examples.en: In a gravity-free room, everything floats.
examples.zh: 在無重力的房間裡,所有東西都會漂浮。

examples.en: Astronauts train in a gravity-free pool.
examples.zh: 太空人在無重力的水池中訓練。

img: objects floating in gravity-free space cabin

examples.en: The orbit path of the comet is very long.
examples.zh: 這顆彗星的運行軌跡非常長。

examples.en: Engineers plan the orbit path of each satellite.
examples.zh: 工程師規劃每顆衛星的運行軌跡。

img: curved orbit path lines around a planet

examples.en: We love to stargaze on clear summer nights.
examples.zh: 我們喜歡在晴朗的夏夜觀星。

examples.en: You can stargaze better far from city lights.
examples.zh: 遠離城市燈光更適合觀星。

img: people lying down stargazing under night sky

examples.en: The spacecraft landed safely on Mars.
examples.zh: 這艘太空載具安全降落在火星上。

examples.en: A small spacecraft carried the samples home.
examples.zh: 一艘小型太空載具把樣本帶回家。

img: small spacecraft landing on planet surface

examples.en: That star is many light-years away.
examples.zh: 那顆星星在許多光年之外。

examples.en: A light-year measures huge distances in space.
examples.zh: 光年用來測量太空中的巨大距離。

img: vast starfield showing distance in light-years

examples.en: Some people believe aliens might exist.
examples.zh: 有些人相信外星人可能存在。

examples.en: The movie is about a friendly alien.
examples.zh: 這部電影是關於一個友善的外星人。

img: green alien creature with big eyes in space

examples.en: The observatory has a giant telescope.
examples.zh: 這座天文台有一台巨大的望遠鏡。

examples.en: We visited an observatory on the mountain.
examples.zh: 我們參觀了山上的一座天文台。

img: domed observatory building on mountain at night

examples.en: A nebula is a colorful cloud of gas in space.
examples.zh: 星雲是太空中一團色彩繽紛的氣體雲。

examples.en: New stars are born inside a nebula.
examples.zh: 新的恆星在星雲中誕生。

img: colorful glowing nebula gas cloud in space

examples.en: A galaxy cluster holds hundreds of galaxies.
examples.zh: 一個星系團包含數百個星系。

examples.en: Scientists study the huge galaxy cluster.
examples.zh: 科學家研究這個巨大的星系團。

img: cluster of many galaxies grouped in space

examples.en: The rover drives slowly across Mars.
examples.zh: 探測車在火星上緩慢行駛。

examples.en: A rover collects rocks from the planet.
examples.zh: 探測車在行星上採集岩石。

img: robotic rover driving on red Mars surface

examples.en: The night sky was full of stars.
examples.zh: 夜空中布滿了星星。

examples.en: We enjoy watching the night sky together.
examples.zh: 我們喜歡一起看夜空。

img: starry night sky over quiet dark landscape
